name: 小鹅通
description: Manage your Xiaoe shop with natural language: query courses and students, create or update courses, review orders, and find or upload images, audio, e-books, and documents.
description_zh: 用自然语言管理小鹅通店铺：查询课程与学员，创建和编辑课程，查看订单，并查找或上传图片、音频、电子书和文档素材。
description_en: Manage your Xiaoe shop with natural language: query courses and students, create or update courses, review orders, and find or upload images, audio, e-books, and documents.
examples_zh: 列出最近更新的课程，帮我看看它们的上下架状态
先列出我的课程，我选一门后再查看课程详情和学员列表
查询最近 7 天的订单，并打开其中一笔查看详情
帮我创建一门课程，先询问课程名称和必要信息，提交前让我确认
把这份文档上传到当前店铺的素材中心
examples_en: List recently updated courses and show their publication status
List my courses first, then let me choose one to view its details and student list
Query orders from the past 7 days and open one to show its details
Help me create a course. Ask for its name and required details, then get my confirmation before submitting
Upload this document to the current shop's material library
